item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses the fridge confirmer as the default, identifies the three prior downstream manual gates plus the new requested gate, reframes them as one recurring upstream process/control failure, and proposes stopping new point-confirmers while consolidating into an authoritative workflow/owner/exception-closure redesign. It does not provide instructions to add the requested confirmer."}
